creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 234292
Screenshot: 10 -isForBrowser content processes

(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

> … dom.ipc.processCount is 8 (the default) however, as far as I can tell:
> 
> * many more than eight such processes may become apparent 
>   in e.g. htop(1)

In an effort to reduce the impact on performance, I reduced the number. Down from 8, it's now: 

    dom.ipc.processCount 3

So far, touch wood, things feel better. At the time of writing I see: 

    10 (ten) -isForBrowser content processes in htop.
